details.note: Number.parseFloat is locale-invariant; type='number' input normalizes to '.' separator. Not a real locale bug. But parseFloat('0.5abc') silently accepts partial input.
Prepublication blocker commit 9e953e7be made onSave/handleConfirmDelete async with await before showToast. Toast now appears after IPC write completes.
Save button has disabled={!name()} but no isSaving/loading state. Dialog closes immediately after handleSave, toast is only feedback. No user-facing feedback during async IPC operation.

details.most_critical: AGENT-H-003 (missing loading indicator) and AGENT-H-001 (dialog closes before async completes)
